case_title: JORGE L. OLASCOAGA VS. ISAAC PRADO LERMA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-03-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-11-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT. 8, 2010 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT. 8, 2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLASCOAGA, JORGE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LERMA, ISAAC PRADO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, NO COSTS AWARDED, IFP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ISAAC PRADO LERMA IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING FEBRUARY 15, 2011, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $100.00. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $1000.00 WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON THE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. CLERK: S. AVNTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
